title: BaedoorLib
description: Expansive standalone library mod for Baedoor mods
body:
![BaedoorLib](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/911745320357081089/1139631507422576671/baedoorlib_full.png)
 

BaedoorLib is library mod used as backbone of upcoming Baedoor mods (Wastelands, Civilisations and Spires) adding all shared resources and mechanics.

Even though it is considered as library, it can be installed as standalone mod and still offer several QoL features. List of features added can be found [here](https://github.com/Toma400/Baedoor_Lib/blob/1.20/mod_features.md).
